dct_title_s: New York City NYPD Criminal Court Summons, 2019
dct_description_sm: New York City Criminal Court Summons, 2019 is a point theme representing every criminal court summons issued by the NYPD in 2019. This dataset was derived from NYC Open Data extracts (from https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Public-Safety/NYPD-Criminal-Court-Summons-Historic-/sv2w-rv3k/) in March 2026. Each record represents a summons that was issued in 2019 in NYC and includes information about the type of violation committed, the relevant penal or local law section number, the age and race of the issue, and the location and time of enforcement. The locations are aggregated to the midblock approximation by the NYPD. Columbia Libraries staff extracted the year's records and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Some records may lack geolocation information, and if so they have coordinates 0,0. Columbia Libraries staff has provided the data in the geopackage format, and a codebook and a has been included in the download package.
